'''fapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wilsomely|wilsomely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wilsomely|wilsomely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fapate|fapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fapatesher|fapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fapatesherĂ«m|fapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fapatero|fapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fapateshĂ«|fapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fapateshĂ«m|fapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifapatero|gokifapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifapateshĂ«|gokifapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifapateshĂ«m|gokifapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofapankerom|gofapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofapankeshĂ«|gofapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofapankeshĂ«m|gofapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofapankeya|gofapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fapaterom|fapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fapatemu|fapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fapateya|fapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifapaterom|gokifapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifapatemu|gokifapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifapateya|gokifapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fapapate|fapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fapapatesher|fapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fapapatesherĂ«m|fapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fapapatero|fapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fapapateshĂ«|fapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fapapateshĂ«m|fapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifapapatero|gokifapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifapapateshĂ«|gokifapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifapapateshĂ«m|gokifapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofapapankerom|gofapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofapapankeshĂ«|gofapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofapapankeshĂ«m|gofapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofapapankeya|gofapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fapapaterom|fapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fapapatemu|fapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fapapateya|fapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifapapaterom|gokifapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifapapatemu|gokifapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifapapateya|gokifapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠte|fĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠtesher|fĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠtero|fĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠpĂŠtero|gokifĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠterom|fĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠtemu|fĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠpĂŠteya|fĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠpĂŠterom|gokifĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠpĂŠteya|gokifĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafpafte|fafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafpaftesher|fafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafpaftesherĂ«m|fafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafpaftero|fafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafpafteshĂ«|fafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafpafteshĂ«m|fafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafpaftero|gokifafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafpafteshĂ«|gokifafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafpafteshĂ«m|gokifafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafpafnkerom|gofafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafpafnkeshĂ«|gofafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafpafnkeshĂ«m|gofafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafpafnkeya|gofafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafpafterom|fafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafpaftemu|fafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafpafteya|fafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafpafterom|gokifafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafpaftemu|gokifafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafpafteya|gokifafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
